title: Command Block Money
description:
Value of all Command Blocks
Command Block 1$ : Repeating 2$ : Chain 64$
body:
# Command Block Currency System
Turn Command Blocks into Valuable Bills!

## Restrictions
Command Blocks cannot be placed or interacted with in Survival mode.

## Value of Each Type
Command Block — $1

Repeating Command Block — $2

Chain Command Block — $64

## Why Use Command Blocks as Currency?
Since Command Blocks can only be obtained through Creative mode, you have full control over how many enter circulation. Unlike diamonds or other resources, this makes Command Blocks perfect for a limited, controlled economy.

<details>
<summary>How to Download</summary>

1. launch Minecraft
2. Click "Esc"
3. Click "Options"
4. Click "Resourse Packs"
5. Open "File Explorer"
6. Go to "Downloads"
7. Drag and Drop The File in the "Resourse Packs" Tab
8. Click "Yes"
9. Then Click the Resourse Pack icon
10. Click Done

**Your Done**
</details>

<details>
